ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC, AND ELBA BORGEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN AND SHOW THAT THE LANGUAGE OF THE EASEMENT IS CLEAR, I.E. IT IS NOT SUSCEPTIBLE TO PLAINTIFF'S INTERPRETATION OR THAT DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION IS THE SOLE INTERPRETATION BASED ON THE CLEAR LANGUAGE OF THE EASEMENT. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT EXIST AS TO THE SCOPE OF THE EASEMENT. SEE DISPUTED FACTS. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO PETERSON DECLARATION SUSTAINED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: SHEILA PHAM CSR #13293 (415-591-3333) SANFRANCISCOSCHEDULING@ESQUIRESOLUTIONS.COM. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC AND ELBA BORGEN'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Additionally, the motion is moot. See Dowling Declaration. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Continued To Oct-15-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Curtis Dowling (415-977-0444x233) for Plaintiff/opposing party John Barry and May Pon.
G. Ryan Patric (415-552-8230) for Defendant/Moving party 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC, and ELBA BORGEN.
Court reporter: Sheila Pham CSR #13293 (415-591-3333) sanfranciscoscheduling@esquiresolutions.com.

The Court announced the tentative ruling. Defendant ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) re: no rule not allowing defendant to file amended separate statement, not defendant's burden to show language is clear, and different interpretation of the language. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC, and ELBA BORGEN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that the language of the easement is clear, i.e. it is not susceptible to Plaintiff's interpretation or that Defendant's interpretation is the sole interpretation based on the clear language of the easement. Triable issues of fact exist as to the scope of the easement. See disputed facts. Plaintiff's objections to Peterson declaration sustained. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham CSR #13293 (415-591-3333) sanfranciscoscheduling@esquiresolutions.com. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Set For Trial On Oct-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
